Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GARY CLOUTIER, Esq. of Law Offices of Hoa T. Cooc (Tel: 510-268-8063) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MARY GEE's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Verified Discovery Responses; Verified Special Interrogatories Set Two And For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for plaintiff (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Gee's MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S VERIFICATIONS TO DISCOVERY RESPONSES; VERIFIED SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET TWO AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS is GRANTED. Plaintiff Liang shall provide verifications to Special Interrogatories, Set Two, within five days of notice of this order. The request for sanctions is denied.

The Court instructs counsel for plaintiff to prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and to e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
